item.title: A nice addition to THT
item.description: I really like this song but couldn’t find this specific remix of it. I was able to find both songs that were used though. That’s about as far as I got with my search. Most Viral edit: Video Source is @TaoBaiBaiYa from YouTube: https://youtube.com/shorts/TqhQunzymoA She also has an instagram that others have pointed out in the comments @taobaiyaa : https://www.instagram.com/taobaiyaa/ For the remix of this song: status is still unknown But I did find the female vocals song that seemed to be used as well as the main song. My thinking is this is a custom remix made specifically for this short form video. I think it would be nice to have a full version if possible. I’m not very good at using DAWs, yet so maybe someone more talented and knowledgeable is up for the task? Female vocals song: https://youtu.be/Jd5GaSPeNJY Main song: https://youtu.be/y-4hJN4brtk?si=hr_PfIixBvv-xyKc
item.dc:creator: Mal1t1a

item.title: Yucky [OC]
item.description: Storytime! So THIS was going to be the original BONUS panel to this comic, but "Woman Yelling at Cat" meme was the hot-ticket at the time so hubby suggested doing that instead. A classic was born!
item.dc:creator: LitterboxComics

item.title: How to Drive a manual transmission car
item.dc:creator: SweepTheLeg31

item.title: I dun messed up.
item.description: I really just didn't feel like seeing family (trumpers) this year. My wife works grave shift tonight. I was supposed to go to Thanksgiving dinner alone. She always sleeps before a shift, normally till 4:30. The plan was to just say i left early and got home right before she woke up. She woke up real early. She's currently talking with her sister on the phone. She just sent me a text saying she's now "on call" for work tonight. Edit: On the upside, I get to hear her singing to our dog now. God I'll miss her when she divorces me. Edit: I told her I was home and came downstairs. She laughed more than she got upset. I will be promptly putting up the new curtains she picked out. Edit: No we are not in divorce territory. That was a joke/panic attack
item.dc:creator: 5omeWhiteGuy

item.title: Images of Note: Mweh!
item.description:
into the hole
I have....a thing to stop that
PISS JUUL!
Welp, horses are now terrifying
There's a difference between chaotically swearing like an ADHD goblin and delivering swears semi deadpan.
My fun fact is that I was born covered in my own shit.
HIS BALLS? ATTACHED TO A CAR BATTERY! HIS HANDS, PLAYING WITH GHOST NIPPLES!
HELL YEAH
oval shape
IT'S GAVLEBOCKEN SEASON
b a n d e d
Well I will.
wow!
Not sure how more religion is going to stop that.
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging http://bsky.abbii.gay: For Bluesky :3

item.title: Happy FF <3
item.description: I hope you all had amazing food yesterday, I am so full they will have to get a crane to get me on the plane when i say goodbye to my family again We had turkey, cornbread, green bean casserole, pumpkin pie, and now i cant walk anymore, I have to roll <3
